user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter overtime requests by period, status and department, so that I can locate the OT requests I need to review
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Over Time Request screen; When I set period, status or department and click Search; Then only matching overtime requests are listed

user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter overtime by statuses such as Pending with me, Approved, Rejected and Cancelled, so that I can focus on requests awaiting action
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Over Time Request screen; When I select the Pending with me status; Then only requests awaiting my action are displayed

user_story: As a Manager, I want to compare recorded OT hours with approved OT hours per employee, so that I can verify overtime before approving
acceptance_criteria: Given overtime requests exist; When the grid loads; Then columns for employee code, employee name, department, over time date, approved OT hours, recorded OT hours and status are shown

user_story: As a Manager, I want to approve or reject overtime via the Task column, so that employees are compensated correctly for extra hours
acceptance_criteria: Given an overtime request is pending; When I act on the Task column; Then the request status is updated to Approved or Rejected

user_story: As a Manager, I want to toggle active and inactive employees and refresh the list, so that I keep the overtime view relevant and current
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Over Time Request screen; When I switch between Active and Inactive employees and click Refresh; Then the list updates accordingly
